summary: Iteration 9: Parent Portal - All 24 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully verified: Parent Portal page loads with stats cards, My Children tab shows linked students, Progress Report displays grades/attendance/assignments/discipline, Meetings tab has scheduler form with faculty dropdown, Link Student dialog works correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in console (accessibility improvement)

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/parents/link-student correctly resolves student by student_code and creates parent-student link
GET /api/parents/progress/{student_id} returns comprehensive data: student info, semesters with grades, attendance stats with recent records, assignments stats, discipline records
GET /api/parents/available-faculty returns active faculty with id, full_name, position, department, email
Meetings CRUD (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE) all working correctly with faculty_name and student_name enrichment
ParentPortal.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Layout.jsx correctly includes parentNavItems with Portal link for parent users
Progress report displays attendance dots with color-coded status (present/absent/tardy/excused)
Meeting status badges correctly styled (requested=amber, confirmed=green, completed=blue, cancelled=red)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Parent Portal UI features working correctly

parent_student_linking.link_by_code: POST /api/parents/link-student with student_code resolves student and creates link ✓
parent_student_linking.ui_link_dialog: Link Student dialog opens, accepts code, links student ✓

progress_report.semesters_grades: Returns grades grouped by semester with GPA calculation ✓
progress_report.attendance_stats: Returns total, present, absent, tardy, excused, rate, recent records ✓
progress_report.assignments_stats: Returns total, completed, missing, recent assignments ✓
progress_report.discipline_stats: Returns total, unresolved, recent discipline records ✓
progress_report.ui_progress_view: Progress report displays all stats with visual attendance dots ✓

available_faculty.faculty_fields: Returns id, full_name, position, department, email ✓

meetings_crud.create: POST /api/parents/meetings creates meeting with enriched names ✓
meetings_crud.ui_scheduler: Meeting scheduler form with faculty dropdown and date picker ✓
meetings_crud.ui_meeting_list: Meetings displayed with status badges and action buttons ✓

frontend_ui.parent_portal_page: ParentPortal page loads at /ParentPortal with stats cards ✓
frontend_ui.my_children_tab: Shows linked student cards with name, grade, GPA, status ✓
frontend_ui.progress_report_view: Clicking student opens ProgressReport with all data ✓
frontend_ui.back_button: Back button from progress report returns to portal ✓
frontend_ui.meetings_tab: Shows MeetingScheduler form and meeting list ✓

seed_data_verified.student: John Smith (STU001, Grade 10, GPA: 3.65) linked to admin user
seed_data_verified.grades: Fall 2025: Math A (GPA 4.00), Spring 2026: Geometry B+ (GPA 3.30)
seed_data_verified.meeting: Confirmed meeting with Sarah Johnson on 2026-02-15 re: John Smith

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9: Parent Portal features fully implemented and tested. Backend has /api/parents/ routes for student linking, progress reports, meetings CRUD, and available faculty. Frontend ParentPortal.jsx has My Children tab (linked students), Meetings tab (scheduler + list), Progress Report view (grades by semester, attendance dots, assignments, discipline), and Link Student dialog. All data-testid attributes properly implemented. Test data: John Smith (STU001) linked to admin, Sarah Johnson faculty, one confirmed meeting exists.
